name: CASO B - Denuncia Digital (con endpoints simulados)

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ {
  transaction_id: $json.transaction_id,
  citizen_id: $json.citizen_id,
  document_number: $json.document_number,
  incident_description: $json.incident_description,
  incident_address: $json.incident_address,
  incident_category: $json.incident_category,
  municipality_code: $json.municipality_code,
  requested_scope: $('Webhook - Evento de denuncia').item.json.body?.requested_scope ?? $('Webhook - Evento de denuncia').item.json.requested_scope ?? 'denuncia.write denuncia.read',
  delay_ms: $('Webhook - Evento de denuncia').item.json.body?.delay_ms ?? $('Webhook - Evento de denuncia').item.json.delay_ms,
  jitter_ms: $('Webhook - Evento de denuncia').item.json.body?.jitter_ms ?? $('Webhook - Evento de denuncia').item.json.jitter_ms,
  fail_rate: $('Webhook - Evento de denuncia').item.json.body?.fail_rate ?? $('Webhook - Evento de denuncia').item.json.fail_rate,
  force_error: $('Webhook - Evento de denuncia').item.json.body?.force_error ?? $('Webhook - Evento de denuncia').item.json.force_error,
  force_reject: $('Webhook - Evento de denuncia').item.json.body?.force_auth_reject ?? $('Webhook - Evento de denuncia').item.json.force_auth_reject ?? false
} }}
